overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character exploring floating mountain terrain. The character walks along mossy cliff paths, climbs a vine up a rock face, and navigates through dense alien vegetation with bioluminescent flora before entering a narrow rock crevice.

scene_state.functional_zone: mossy cliff base with climbing vine

events.description: character begins climbing the thick vine attached to the rock face
character reaches the top of the climb and resumes walking

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow mossy path at the cliff base then climbing a vine up the rock face to reach an upper level

entered.detail: tall rock wall covered in green moss and vegetation
glowing purple and blue alien plants lining the path
massive floating rock islands visible in the background sky
thick rope-like vine hanging down the rock face for climbing

segments.scene_description: The Na'vi character walks along a narrow mossy path at the base of a cliff, surrounded by bioluminescent alien flora. The character approaches and climbs a thick vine up the rock face, reaching an upper cliff path with views of floating mountains in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with floating mountain views

events.description: path opens to reveal expansive floating mountain vista with waterfalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a narrow cliff edge with panoramic views of floating mountains and waterfalls

entered.detail: steep drop-off along the right side of the path
large alien ferns with broad fronds lining the path
mist rising from distant waterfalls between floating mountains

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated cliffside path with expansive views of floating mountains and misty waterfalls in the background. The path is lined with giant ferns and alien vegetation, with a steep cliff edge on one side and rock overhangs providing partial cover.

events.description: entering area with denser bioluminescent plant life and larger flora

agents.ego_description: navigating a narrow path surrounded by dense alien vegetation and glowing bioluminescent plants

entered.detail: rocky overhang providing partial shelter above the path
glowing blue spherical plants embedded in the rock wall
dark narrow opening between rock walls ahead

segments.scene_description: The path becomes more enclosed as the character walks through dense alien jungle with large bioluminescent pods and ferns. The terrain narrows as the character approaches a dark canyon entrance between tall rock walls.

events.description: entering narrow rock canyon passage with tall walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: walking into a narrow rock crevice between tall stone walls, moving from open cliffside into enclosed passage

entered.detail: tall vertical rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall vertical rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
shadowed interior of the cave system ahead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rock crevice with tall canyon walls on both sides, transitioning from the open cliffside into an enclosed, sheltered passage with dimmer lighting and sparse ground vegetation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from an open, bioluminescent cliffside into the depths of a narrow rock canyon. It begins with a Na'vi character traversing a mossy path at the base of a cliff before climbing a thick vine to reach an elevated vantage point overlooking distant floating mountains and misty waterfalls. As the character moves along this high ridge lined with giant ferns, the expansive vista gradually gives way to a more enclosed jungle filled with large bioluminescent pods. The scene then shifts as the terrain narrows, leading the character away from the open air and toward a dark canyon entrance. Finally, the camera follows the character into a sheltered rock crevice, where the bright alien landscape is replaced by tall canyon walls and dimmer, atmospheric lighting.
